plan.annotation: Direction: top-to-bottom. The dashed return path shows validation issues routed back to the client before any review or commit can occur. Source: Lifecycle events (sequence-events).

operations.label: Five lifelines: User, NodeSlide client, Planning model, Validator, Adapter
Ordered messages: submit brief, bounded context, typed plan, validate, human review, commit, versioned receipt
Failed-validation return: validator sends issues back to the client, before review and commit

plan.pptxFallback: PowerPoint export uses editable lifelines and directional arrows as native shapes; a static Mermaid image is not promotion-eligible.
plan.takeaway: Validation precedes review, acceptance precedes commit, and only accepted proposals reach the adapter, which returns a versioned receipt.
plan.title: Request Lifecycle: Submit to Versioned Receipt
